name: ocean-schedules
description: Compare ocean carrier sailing schedules, transit times, and observed on-time reliability before you book — 60+ carriers live, 72,000+ forward sailings, 5,000+ lanes, reliability scored from 4,200+ observed port calls. Remote Streamable HTTP server at https://mcp.schedulesmcp.com/mcp — public demo key smcp_demo_public for connection testing; live data and docs at https://schedulesmcp.com.
